hero.specialty: PHP · Laravel · PostgreSQL | WMS/YMS Specialist & Clean Architecture
hero.summary: Full-stack developer with solid experience in PHP, Laravel, PostgreSQL, and agile methodologies. Specialized in building management systems (WMS/YMS) and vehicle tracking platforms. Proven track record of developing systems from scratch—from planning to production—defining architecture and providing technical leadership as a Scrum Master.

items.description: End-to-end development of a system from scratch: architecture definition, technology selection, and implementation using PHP/Laravel/PostgreSQL. Direct interaction with clients and POs to translate business requirements into robust technical solutions. Applied Clean Architecture patterns to ensure maintainability, security, and high performance. Leading agile ceremonies (Scrum), managing sprints, and maintaining active communication with stakeholders.

Developed and maintained a WMS (Warehouse Management System) focusing on new feature implementation and critical bug fixes. Acted as Scrum Master: monitoring teams, conducting agile ceremonies, and managing the product backlog. Optimized SQL queries and integrated external APIs, improving performance for high-demand operational environments.
Developed a vehicle tracking application using Laravel with real-time data integration. Implemented complex business rules and designed relational database structures.

Developed API-driven applications focusing on AWS and marketplace integrations. Maintained and evolved financial systems using PHP, Laravel, and PostgreSQL. Active participation in agile ceremonies and provided technical support to internal users.
Technical leadership on a from-scratch project with modular monolith architecture in production
Reduction in WMS report response time through SQL query optimization
Increase in squad productivity while acting as Scrum Master
Complex integrations with marketplace APIs and vehicle tracking systems
